whitelist_bridge_custody.label: Bridge/Custody Router Candidate
whitelist_bridge_custody.notes: Largest inflow counterparty observed in treasury full flows; treated as bridge/custody candidate.

whitelist_bridge_custody.label: Base Treasury Ops Hot Wallet
whitelist_bridge_custody.notes: High-frequency routing address paired with many mirrored inflow/outflow transactions.

whitelist_bridge_custody.label: Base System/Custody Sink
whitelist_bridge_custody.notes: System-like counterparty recurrent in tiny mirrored transfers with treasury ops wallet.

rules: self-transfer-mirrored: tx has inflow and outflow with <= 2% USD delta
bridge-custody-routing: tx has both directions, contains bridge/custody whitelist address, and <= 15% USD delta
internal-contract-routing: tx has both directions, contains gnars contract address, and <= 15% USD delta
